package rulecoverage

func PositiveHandlerSwitchesOnErrorStrings() string {
    ruleID := "handler_switches_on_error_strings"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that branch on `err.Error()` text rather than typed errors."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
